memory:memory/2026-04-22.md:16:21.snippet: - Important correction for future reasoning: do not blame `plugins.slots.memory` first when doctor says no active memory plugin is registered. Check `plugins.entries.memory-core.enabled` and memory-search provider readiness separately, then verify the live state before repeating an older diagnosis. ## Additional durable updates - The user-visible filler reply `Nothing to add right now.` was traced to the outbound silent-reply rewrite layer, not to the model, followup runner, or `routeReply` inventing content. The critical rewrite happens in outbound planning when an exact preserved `NO_REPLY` reaches `createOutboundPayloadPlan(...)` under a direct-session silent policy with rewrite enabled.
